creator: leeb@ratnaling.org
text:
Using bsdinstall(8) I made a new system but did not configure the network.
After booting into the system, local mail was not working and I was unable to

root@my-test-mach:~ # ping `hostname`
ping: cannot resolv my-test-mach: Host name lookup failure

This causes all local mail to fail, /var/spool/mqueue just fills up.  periodic scripts therefore don't populate root's mail.

Solved by manually adding hostname to /etc/hosts
